description: Four reader peers should each converge on the same two-document verified object set after syncing from a single seed.

assertions.description: All four reader peers store the same verified canonical object IDs for both documents.
All four reader peers compute the same replay result for the two-document set.
All four reader peers agree on the same accepted head revision IDs for each document.

notes: Extends three-peer-consistency to N=4 readers and 2 documents.
Proves that convergence checks and scheduler ordering hold for larger peer groups and multi-document seeds.
